---
title: "The Nut-Brown Maids, or, The First Hosier and his Hosen: A Family Chronicle of the Days of Queen Elizabeth"
---

## The Nut-Brown Maids, or, The First Hosier and his Hosen: A Family Chronicle of the Days of Queen Elizabeth

**Author:** Sarah Tytler
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** London: Parker

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
